title: Area of a Circle
description:
Write code that calculates and prints the area of a circle with radius 5. Use the formula area = 3.14 * radius * radius.

The output should be exactly:
The area of a circle with radius 5 is 78.5
expected_output: The area of a circle with radius 5 is 78.5

code_requirements.description: Creates a variable called 'radius' set to 5
code_requirements.fail_message: Make sure you create a variable called 'radius' with the value 5.

code_requirements.description: Uses multiplication (*) to calculate the area
code_requirements.fail_message: Use the multiplication operator (*) to calculate radius * radius * 3.14 instead of hardcoding the result.

code_requirements.description: Uses 3.14 as the value of pi
code_requirements.fail_message: Use 3.14 in your calculation instead of hardcoding the final number 78.5.

hints: Create a variable called radius and set it to 5
Calculate the area using: 3.14 * radius * radius
Use an f-string like f"The area... is {area}" to format the output

tests.expected_output: The area of a circle with radius 5 is 78.5
